channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping AGAIN!, 17th May
item.description:
A mattress and wooden frame has been dumped.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Penton Place, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More dog fouling on Templecombe Rd, 17th May
item.description:
A LOT of dog fouling left on Templecombe Rd in front of Swingfield House. This is a recurring issue, likely the same dog owners. Please arrange for cleaning and a plan to address the issue.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Templecombe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox, 17th May
item.description:
Dead fox in Kenmere Road been there since yesterday
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Kenmere Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip and waste on median road again, 17th May
item.description:
Massive fly tip and waste all over street outside flat 30

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Median Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox cub in Dolphin Close, 17th May
item.description:
There’s a dead fox cub in Dolphin Close. It has entrails hanging out of its body.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Ironside Close, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tags, 17th May
item.description:
Please cleans.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike abandoned for several years, 17th May
item.description:
This bike has been here for years and gets in the way of parked cars.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hertford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Armchair outside 40 Macoma Rd, 17th May
item.description:
Large arm chair on pavement, making it hard to get buggies around.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Macoma Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Top end of cavendish Road near crossing intersecting with Kilburn high road. Sainsbury’s local side., 17th May
item.description:
There is a hole in the pavement and random tyres holding down barriers. It is dangerous and unsightly and should be rectified with the council tax paid.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cavendish Close, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge and other items dumped on pavement /alleyway, 17th May
item.description:
Fridge and other items dumped on pavement /alleyway. This alleyway was added to regular cleaning schedule at the request of the local MP. Please clear

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 63 Judd Street, 17th May
item.description:
These finished roadworks appear to have been forgotten or abandoned. This has been in this state for months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Judd Street, King's Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic light stuck on red, 17th May
item.description:
They keep rotating to red even when no one crosses the road causing unnesseccary queues.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rush Green Road, Rush Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 17th May
item.description:
Bagged outside 103a

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Bexley Road, Northumberland Heath, Erith, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Child's bed, mattresses and other junk fly tipped., 17th May
item.description:
Someone has left an entire child's bed with mattresses here.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Park Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: PAINT SPILLAGE End of Lanridge Road SE2 Bexley, 17th May
item.description:
A whole tub of 12Litre paint was spilled on the path/walkway on the end of lanridge road which as you can see has led to footmarks from both people and dogs/foxes,also paint stains on the walkway rails

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dalberg Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 6ft x 4ft pot hole outside number 99 halfway street, 17th May
item.description:
This pot hole has been reported once again after being patched months before . It is in my opinion dangerous to the public as cars Lorries and busses are swerving close to the curb to avoid it . It is also felt on our homes as well as the whole house shakes when heavy vehicles drive in it .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lamorbey Close, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trip hazard, 17th May
item.description:
Somebody has left a long metal lamp post object at the edge of kerb which is a trip hazard when getting on the bus.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18-19, Camberwell Green, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike path, 17th May
item.description:
Border stone moved. Big hole in the bike path edge.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southampton Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter Nisa/bus stop to be cleared, 17th May
item.description:
Litter picking needed Barry Road outside nisa/bus stop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped cardboard, 17th May
item.description:
On pavement - pls remove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
